title: Thai Corn Chowder
description: A hearty and flavorful Thai-inspired corn chowder perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add the onions and garlic and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the corn, potatoes, and broth to the pot. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 15-20 minutes.
Use an immersion blender to puree the soup until slightly smooth. Alternatively, transfer the soup to a blender and blend until smooth, then return it to the pot.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed. Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
